finding_results.evidence: Spike's four cited lines are now anchored in concrete logistics fragments. At `chapters/chapter_17.md:139` the former thesis-metaphor ('I keep trying to make a person out of a route') is replaced with literal inventory: 'I had a cargo code. Drop schedule. Delay notice that sat in a box for—I don't know. Months.' At `chapters/chapter_17.md:143` the composed observation ('Everyone wants you to have known what it meant') becomes the concrete evasion 'Nobody opens the crates.' At `chapters/chapter_17.md:171` the system-level framing ('That's how it works') is removed; Spike now lists only mundane fragments: 'Some guy's filing something. Lunch. A crate goes on a truck.' At `chapters/chapter_17.md:177` the moral verdict ('Doesn't let anybody off') is eliminated entirely—Spike puts the cigarette back between his lips and says nothing. Moral-inference work shifts to Jet's interiority at `chapters/chapter_17.md:173` ('The fan in records. The cheap pen. The mustard tie.'), echoing his precinct-memory details from earlier in the chapter without articulating a thesis. None of Spike's revised lines reads as a standalone moral aphorism when lifted from context.
finding_results.notes: Replaced four Spike lines that drifted into polished thematic summary with concrete route/procedural fragments per style-bible register (high contraction, short declaratives, concrete nouns, indirect emotional content, evasion through scope-narrowing). Preserved productive roughness: false start at line 139 ('for—I don't know'), trailing energy in compound listing at line 143, and Spike's characteristic lower-energy sentence landings. Moved inference work to Jet's interiority (line 173) using specific sensory callbacks to the fitness-review memory established earlier in the chapter (line 65). No new continuity contradictions introduced; no lines from style-bible example_lines used verbatim.

pass_summaries.summary: Resolved both packet findings by making Ren's hesitation physically specific in the bay scene and restructuring the breakfast close so the comic denial lands once before the chapter ends on deferred archive pressure, domestic choice, and Ren's partial inclusion.

Single finding addressed: Spike's dialogue in the nighttime exchange (lines 139-177) was revised to remove four lines that read as polished moral aphorisms ('I keep trying to make a person out of a route,' 'Everyone wants you to have known what it meant,' 'That's how it works,' 'Doesn't let anybody off') and replace them with concrete logistics fragments and evasive speech consistent with Spike's style-bible register. The chapter's moral weight is preserved through Jet's interiority and the reader's inference rather than through Spike articulating the thesis. All other chapter text, including the Faye-Ren bay scene, the breakfast scene, heading contract, and continuity details, is unchanged.
Revised chapter 17's Faye/Ren bay scene for prose variation and copyedit finish, resolving the packet's repeated eye-direction beat issue while preserving voice, pressure, and continuity.
